header.title: Movie Management Dashboard
header.short: SPA dashboard for managing movie catalog. Secure CRUD, Supabase authentication, advanced React Query usage, robust forms and automated tests.

summary.heading: Summary
summary.text: Movie Management Dashboard is a SPA for internal movie catalog management. Full CRUD, authentication for permission control and React Query for data sync. The focus was security, UX, modularity and testing.

problem.heading: Problem solved
problem.text: Needed a fast, secure, easy platform for users to manage movies. Authentication and permission control were key: only the author can edit/delete own records. Efficient and scalable data handling was required.

techTools.heading: Technologies & tools
techTools.text: Stack chosen for speed, robustness & best practices: React + Vite, TypeScript & Tailwind for UI; Supabase for backend, React Query for fetching/caching; typed validations and tests.
list: Supabase (Auth, Row Level Security, Realtime Database)
react-hook-form + Zod for forms and validations
Vitest + React Testing Library for integrated tests

architecture.heading: Architecture & decisions
architecture.text: Modularity prioritized: custom hooks for Supabase & React Query, separation of logic: UI components, data hooks & views. Supabase RLS ensures data mutation integrity. Code is portable, easy to test & extend.

implementation.heading: Featured implementation
implementation.hookDescription: This hook combines react-query and Supabase to get/sync movies. Leverages react-query cache, automatic refetch and error handling.

accessibility.heading: Accessibility
accessibility.lead: UI components are accessible (roles, aria-labels). Keyboard navigation. Adequate contrast. Alert messages for CRUD feedback.
list: Focus visible: clear indicators for inputs and buttons.
Accessible alerts/messages for feedback after operations.

performance.heading: Performance & results
list: Render optimization via react-query and cache.
Lazy-load components only on needed routes.

challenges.heading: Challenges & learnings
list: Configuring RLS in Supabase for security.
Refactored to decouple hooks & UI logic.
